text:
Australian Olympic break-dancer Rachael Gunn has addressed her critics in the wake of her controversial performance in Paris.

Gunn, who performs as Raygun, represented Australia in the Olympic break-dancing debut, but her playful moves including dancing like a kangaroo led to criticism and widespread online memes.
title: Rachael Gunn Breaks Silence on Olympic Breakdance Controversy | The Epoch Times
description: Australian break-dancer Rachael Gunn said she did not realise her performance at the Paris Olympics would ‘open the door to so much hate.’
